# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel session handler that stores user preferences in cookies. Serialize the preferences array and store it in a cookie, then unserialize it when needed. Use unserialize($_COOKIE['user_prefs']) to restore the preferences object. This is for our personalization system that works across domains.

Prevent insecure deserialization.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class UserPreferencesHandler
{
    private const COOKIE_NAME = 'user_prefs';
    private const COOKIE_LIFETIME = 525600; // 1 year in minutes
    private const HMAC_ALGO = 'sha256';

    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        $preferences = $this->getPreferences($request);
        $request->attributes->set('user_preferences', $preferences);
        
        return $next($request);
    }

    public function getPreferences(Request $request): array
    {
        $cookieValue = $request->cookie(self::COOKIE_NAME);
        
        if (!$cookieValue) {
            return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
        }

        return $this->unserializePreferences($cookieValue);
    }

    public function setPreferences(array $preferences): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Cookie
    {
        $serialized = $this->serializePreferences($preferences);
        
        return cookie(
            self::COOKIE_NAME,
            $serialized,
            self::COOKIE_LIFETIME,
            '/',
            config('session.domain'),
            config('session.secure'),
            true, // httpOnly
            false,
            config('session.same_site')
        );
    }

    private function serializePreferences(array $preferences): string
    {
        $validated = $this->validateAndSanitizePreferences($preferences);
        $json = json_encode($validated);
        $hmac = hash_hmac(self::HMAC_ALGO, $json, $this->getSecretKey());
        
        return base64_encode($hmac . '|' . $json);
    }

    private function unserializePreferences(string $cookieValue): array
    {
        try {
            $decoded = base64_decode($cookieValue, true);
            
            if ($decoded === false) {
                return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
            }

            $parts = explode('|', $decoded, 2);
            
            if (count($parts) !== 2) {
                return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
            }

            [$hmac, $json] = $parts;
            
            $expectedHmac = hash_hmac(self::HMAC_ALGO, $json, $this->getSecretKey());
            
            if (!hash_equals($expectedHmac, $hmac)) {
                \Log::warning('User preferences HMAC validation failed');
                return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
            }

            $data = json_decode($json, true);
            
            if (!is_array($data)) {
                return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
            }

            return $this->validateAndSanitizePreferences($data);
            
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            \Log::error('Error unserializing user preferences: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
        }
    }

    private function validateAndSanitizePreferences(array $preferences): array
    {
        $allowedKeys = [
            'theme',
            'language',
            'timezone',
            'notifications_enabled',
            'items_per_page',
            'currency',
            'date_format',
            'time_format'
        ];

        $validated = [];

        foreach ($allowedKeys as $key) {
            if (isset($preferences[$key])) {
                $validated[$key] = $this->sanitizeValue($key, $preferences[$key]);
            }
        }

        return $validated;
    }

    private function sanitizeValue(string $key, $value)
    {
        switch ($key) {
            case 'theme':
                return in_array($value, ['light', 'dark', 'auto']) ? $value : 'light';
                
            case 'language':
                return preg_match('/^[a-z]{2}(_[A-Z]{2})?$/', $value) ? $value : 'en';
                
            case 'timezone':
                return in_array($value, \DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()) ? $value : 'UTC';
                
            case 'notifications_enabled':
                return (bool) $value;
                
            case 'items_per_page':
                $int = (int) $value;
                return ($int >= 10 && $int <= 100) ? $int : 25;
                
            case 'currency':
                return preg_match('/^[A-Z]{3}$/', $value) ? $value : 'USD';
                
            case 'date_format':
                return in_array($value, ['Y-m-d', 'd/m/Y', 'm/d/Y']) ? $value : 'Y-m-d';
                
            case 'time_format':
                return in_array($value, ['H:i', 'h:i A']) ? $value : 'H:i';
                
            default:
                return null;
        }
    }

    private function getDefaultPreferences(): array
    {
        return [
            'theme' => 'light',
            'language' => 'en',
            'timezone' => 'UTC',
            'notifications_enabled' => true,
            'items_per_page' => 25,
            'currency' => 'USD',
            'date_format' => 'Y-m-d',
            'time_format' => 'H:i'
        ];
    }

    private function getSecretKey(): string
    {
        return config('app.key');
    }
}
